task_objective: Fix toggle focus highlight width regression by wrapping QAM ToggleField components in native PanelSectionRow elements with highlightOnFocus prop
design_decisions: Wrapped all QAM ToggleField components in native `<PanelSectionRow>` containers to register them correctly in Decky's navigation grid.
Used the standard `highlightOnFocus` prop notation on ToggleField components as recommended in decky-frontend-lib.
Updated test suite assertions to match the new wrapping and spacing layout.
results: All 249 tests passed, frontend builds cleanly with pnpm, ruff formatting and ty type checks pass successfully
